spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards to let financial data breathe.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. KPI cards take 1 col, Tables take full width or 3 cols.

cards.style: Flat background, 1px solid border-border, no shadow. Hover: slight shadow-sm.
cards.kpi: Include title, main value (€), and a subtitle with percentage change or context.

tables.style: Dense tabular layout. Use IBM Plex Sans for numbers (tabular lining). Right-align numeric columns.
tables.headers: Sticky headers for scrolling. Background muted.
tables.rows: Hover state: bg-muted/50. Use color selectively for Gain/Loss columns only.

file_upload.style: Large dropzone area. border-2 border-dashed border-primary/30 rounded-xl p-12 bg-primary/5 hover:bg-primary/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer text-center.

buttons.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground font-medium rounded-md

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all interface icons. Use clear, simple metaphors (e.g., Upload, Settings, BarChart3, TrendingUp, TrendingDown).

images.description: Medical supplies on blue - Use as a subtle decorative header background or empty state illustration with low opacity (10%).

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, table headers, file droppers) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-txt-button', data-testid='kpi-total-gain').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI components.
Implement the theme variables in index.css exactly as provided.
Ensure IBM Plex Sans is applied to body text, especially inside tables for tabular lining of numbers.
Build a primary 'Dashboard' page that allows TXT file upload and displays KPIs + Charts.
Build a 'Settings' page for the Cardex XLS file upload.
Implement data-testid attributes on all key interactive elements.
Use Recharts for the laboratory profitability distribution (Bar chart or Pie/Donut).
For the data table, include specific visual styling for positive (green) and negative (red) profitability margins to make analysis fast.
Do NOT use transparent headers. Ensure navigation clearly separates the Dashboard and Settings sections.
Align numeric values in tables to the right.
